'''thazolo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ceder|ceder]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-z-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ceder|ceder]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| thazolo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæzeleth|thæzeleth]] || [[word:thæzelej|thæzelej]] || [[word:thæzelesh|thæzelesh]] || [[word:thæzele|thæzele]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thazozoloth|thazozoloth]] || [[word:thazozoloj|thazozoloj]] || [[word:thazozolosh|thazozolosh]] || [[word:thazozolo|thazozolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazoloth|thazoloth]] || [[word:thazoloj|thazoloj]] || [[word:thazolosh|thazolosh]] || [[word:thazolo|thazolo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazofloth|thazofloth]] || [[word:thazofloj|thazofloj]] || [[word:thazoflosh|thazoflosh]] || [[word:thazoflof|thazoflof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thazolotho|thazolotho]] || [[word:thazolojo|thazolojo]] || [[word:thazolosho|thazolosho]] || [[word:thazoloko|thazoloko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thazoloth|thazoloth]] || [[word:thazoloj|thazoloj]] || [[word:thazolosh|thazolosh]] || [[word:thazolo|thazolo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thazolothol|thazolothol]] || [[word:thazolojol|thazolojol]] || [[word:thazoloshol|thazoloshol]] || [[word:thazolokol|thazolokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thazolothotho|thazolothotho]] || [[word:thazolojojo|thazolojojo]] || [[word:thazoloshosho|thazoloshosho]] || [[word:thazoloko|thazoloko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thazolothon|thazolothon]] || [[word:thazolojon|thazolojon]] || [[word:thazoloshon|thazoloshon]] || [[word:thazolokon|thazolokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thazolothoro|thazolothoro]] || [[word:thazolojoro|thazolojoro]] || [[word:thazoloshoro|thazoloshoro]] || [[word:thazolokoro|thazolokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
